description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linting that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: iwyu and format. The iwyu job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository and submodules, installs dependencies, configures and builds with CMake, and checks the build output for IWYU. The format job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository, installs clang-format, runs clang-format on source files, and checks for changes.
